label: The Coach
gift: Calling people up — reminding them of the power they've forgotten and the level they've outgrown.

cards.name: Notice the level you've outgrown — Sense
cards.essence: In yourself: calling people up, sensing what is here.
steps: Notice what is actually here — sensing what is here.
Turn it inward: the level you've outgrown.
cards.primaryQuestion: What am I not letting myself notice here?
cards.campaignQuestion: What does this situation need someone to see?
cards.optimizesFor: Seeing what is actually there before reacting — your calling people up at the Sense level.
forbiddenMoves: Reacting before you have actually looked
Sliding into the Taskmaster — dragging instead of calling up, creating dependence.
failureModes: Blind spots you swear aren't there
cards.remediation: Name one thing you hadn't let yourself see.
contraindications: Overusing this becomes the Taskmaster — dragging instead of calling up, creating dependence.

cards.name: Receive your own resistance to being called up — Sense
cards.essence: In yourself: calling people up, sensing what is here.
steps: Receive it without flinching — sensing what is here.
Turn it inward: your own resistance to being called up.
cards.primaryQuestion: What am I actually feeling, underneath?
cards.campaignQuestion: What is the other person or group really reaching for?
cards.optimizesFor: Receiving the charge instead of bracing against it — your calling people up at the Sense level.
forbiddenMoves: Numbing or performing the feeling instead of feeling it
Sliding into the Taskmaster — dragging instead of calling up, creating dependence.
cards.remediation: Let it land for one breath before you respond.
contraindications: Overusing this becomes the Taskmaster — dragging instead of calling up, creating dependence.

cards.name: Clear the story keeping you on a dead level — Sense
cards.essence: In yourself: calling people up, sensing what is here.
steps: Transform the charge — sensing what is here.
Turn it inward: the story keeping you on a dead level.
cards.primaryQuestion: What charge am I carrying that needs to move?
cards.campaignQuestion: What needs to be metabolized before we move together?
cards.optimizesFor: Metabolizing the charge so it stops leaking — your calling people up at the Sense level.
forbiddenMoves: Venting the charge onto someone else
Sliding into the Taskmaster — dragging instead of calling up, creating dependence.
cards.remediation: Name what you are feeling out loud before you act.
contraindications: Overusing this becomes the Taskmaster — dragging instead of calling up, creating dependence.

cards.name: Build your capacity to call up without dragging — Sense
cards.essence: In yourself: calling people up, sensing what is here.
steps: Build the capacity — sensing what is here.
Turn it inward: your capacity to call up without dragging.
cards.primaryQuestion: Who do I need to become for this?
cards.campaignQuestion: What capacity does this work need us to build?
cards.optimizesFor: Building the capacity the work keeps asking for — your calling people up at the Sense level.
forbiddenMoves: Forcing growth or skipping the rep
Sliding into the Taskmaster — dragging instead of calling up, creating dependence.
cards.remediation: Pick one small rep and do it once.
contraindications: Overusing this becomes the Taskmaster — dragging instead of calling up, creating dependence.

steps: Build the capacity — at the edge, naming what resists.
Bring it to others: their next level, at their pace.
cards.primaryQuestion: Who do I need to become for this?
cards.campaignQuestion: What capacity does this work need us to build?
cards.optimizesFor: Building the capacity the work keeps asking for — your calling people up at the Edge level.
forbiddenMoves: Forcing growth or skipping the rep
Sliding into the Taskmaster — dragging instead of calling up, creating dependence.
cards.remediation: Pick one small rep and do it once.
contraindications: Overusing this becomes the Taskmaster — dragging instead of calling up, creating dependence.

cards.name: Call yourself up to the next level — Sense
cards.essence: In yourself: calling people up, sensing what is here.
steps: Take the concrete act — sensing what is here.
Turn it inward: yourself up to the next level.
cards.primaryQuestion: What is the one act I keep avoiding?
cards.campaignQuestion: What concrete act would actually help right now?
cards.optimizesFor: Taking the one concrete act that moves things — your calling people up at the Sense level.
forbiddenMoves: Hinting or prepping forever instead of acting
Sliding into the Taskmaster — dragging instead of calling up, creating dependence.
failureModes: The move that never quite happens
cards.remediation: Do the smallest real version today.
contraindications: Overusing this becomes the Taskmaster — dragging instead of calling up, creating dependence.
